channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: A number of pot holes inthe middle of the carriage way, getting bigger and deeper., 20th April
item.description:
Between Charlton kings nursing home and the Catholic church.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Moorend Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes in road - endbof hall road, 20th April
item.description:
Lots of potholes need filling. Not marked with white spray, jut next to ones due for repair!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Hall Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic lights getting stuck on red one way multiple times a day. Causing people to drive very dangerously and get angry, beeping horns. Big problem that needs fixing, 20th April
item.description:
Shurdington Road road temporary traffic lights
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 92, Shurdington Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Light sensor is not detecting vehicles

item.title: Temporary traffic lights faulty, 20th April
item.description:
Temporary traffic lights on Leckhampton Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 92, Shurdington Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Light sensor is not detecting vehicles

item.title: Lots of potholes you didn't fix, 20th April
item.description:
Im very worried about the people that said thay fixed it. Thay obviously have very serious problems with sight. As a safeguard issue the council need to look into this immediately as this is a safety issue. And a liability issue.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple pot holes end of hall road. Needs resurfacing, 20th April
item.description:
Some potholes have white marks around, but multiple potholes still need filling. Pointless waste of time doing half a job! Please resurfacing the end of hall road. It is causing damage to cars and bikes!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Hall Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple pot holes end of hall road. Needs resurfacing, 20th April
item.description:
Some potholes have white marks around, but multiple potholes still need filling. Pointless waste of time doing half a job! Please resurfacing the end of hall road. It is causing damage to cars and bikes!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Hall Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple briken paving slabs, 20th April
item.description:
Building works possibly caused lots of damage to pavement- very unsafe and uneven
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Merlin Way, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Approximately 3ft x 4ft buckled payment. Caused by delivery vehicle, 20th April
item.description:
Next to driveway of 1 Bassett Close next to junction from Bassett close onto Delevale Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bassett Close, Winchcombe, Winchcombe
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox by pavement, 20th April
item.description:
Poor dead fox on pavement by hedge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Montpellier Terrace, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Road Markings problem, 20th April
item.description:
Road closure 28 day please refresh give way markings markings approx x40 600x200mm dots plus x1 3 meter line plus x2 traigle plus x 13 600x100 lines (Faded Road Markings)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 20th April
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure footway aburt level difference please use top soil fill in holes x2 400x400x50mm approx (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 20th April
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure footway aburt level difference please lift and replace raised broken x1 750x 600x20mm slab (FW Broken Slabs)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 20th April
item.description:
Road Lane closure bus lane 28 day please reset x1 rocking sunken drain cover and frame approx 600x600x40mm stats required (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 20th April
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure footway aburt level difference please lift and relay raised x1 750x 600x20mm slab (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 20th April
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure footway aburt level difference please lift and relay raised x1 900x 600x20mm slab (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 20th April
item.description:
Pothole CW 800x500x45mm 2 way stop and go Stats X 3 NSD (CW6 Pothole)
